name: datalens
purpose: Dataset inspector: schema, per-column stats and distributions, class balance, malformed-row and outlier flagging over CSV/Parquet/JSONL/SQLite - one JSON report per call - plus PSI drift comparison between two datasets. DuckDB engine.
why: Compute exact schema/nulls/distincts/outliers locally over the whole file and send only the report - far cheaper and more accurate than pasting a big CSV into context and eyeballing it.
reach_for_me_when: you are about to reason about a dataset from its description instead of measuring it
you need schema, null counts, distributions, or class balance as structured data
you want to know how much two datasets (train/serve, before/after) have drifted
avoid_when: the file is tiny and you can read every row directly

commands.name: profile
commands.summary: One JSON report: schema, stats, balance, outliers, malformed rows

commands.name: compare
commands.summary: Drift between two datasets: PSI per numeric column, share-shift per categorical
